experiment_design: exp1: pure MOEAs vs RF-MOA-guided MOEAs; stop at the same product HV target and compare runtime plus final HV/IGD
hv_calculation: normalized HV using configured experiment-1 calibration boxes: ideal=min(all calibration fronts) and ref=1.1*max(all calibration fronts); max_gen is only a safety cap
igd_reference: per-product nondominated union of all final fronts in experiment 1, normalized by PRODUCT_HV_BOXES
